name: Note From Form

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for referenced functions. See [Function references](https://github.com/ArhiChief/obsidian-note-from-form#function-references).
* Add `validate` function to template. See [validate](https://github.com/ArhiChief/obsidian-note-from-form#validate))
* Provide interface to work with vault files and render companion templates to user defined functions. (see [User API](https://github.com/ArhiChief/obsidian-note-from-form#user-api))
* Add `beforeCreate` function. See [beforeCreate](https://github.com/ArhiChief/obsidian-note-from-form#beforecreate)
* Add samples with real templates used by author during work (see [samples/SRE/README.md](https://github.com/ArhiChief/obsidian-note-from-form/blob/main/samples/SRE/README.md))
* Update documentation
* Some small fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Refactoring of whole project:

- Support of [JSON Schema](https://json-schema.org/) was added for better validation of user defined template (see [schema.json](https://github.com/ArhiChief/obsidian-note-from-form/blob/873e0b9c87894924aeb70bb57d39c9b4e443f571/src/template/schema.json)). Now it's able to provide more verbose output about errors
- Template's FrontMatter parsing changed. Instead of plain string extraction via RegEx, plugin now rely on YAML format used by Obsidian. This allowed to use JSON as template description and add support for describing templates with YAML. Plus formatting support from Obsidian;
- `Re-Build` button was removed. Templates are now reindexed automatically
- `Use template` context menu option was added in addition to commands
- Readme updated, typos fixed
- Note template input form doesn't disappear once `Create` button pressed, so if issue in note creation happens user is able to update provided data
- Most of the code is covered with unit tests, with help of AI, but under human control
- Addressed #8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Display notice about successful template index rebuild;
- Add `Use template` context menu item for files used as template.
